description: save_note_and_emit does not update NoteBodyStore after successful save. REQ-004 item 2 states: 'After save_note_and_emit succeeds, update the in-memory map for that noteId: store the saved body as the last-saved body and set isDirty = false.' REQ-007 item 4 states the same. The save_note_and_emit function at editor.rs:560-572 performs fs_write_file_atomic and emits editing_session_state_changed, but never accesses NoteBodyStore to clear is_dirty. The function signature (app: &AppHandle, note_id: String, body: String) provides no access to the in-memory store. Consequently, after any save — idle or blur — isDirty never transitions back to false through the actual application flow.
expected: save_note_and_emit should accept tauri::State<NoteBodyStore> (or a reference to the store) and, on successful fs_write_file_atomic, update the entry: set is_dirty = false, set last_saved_body = body.
